components.note: Initial bootstrap copies OpenAI's pinned Node binary and package tree. Replace with a Cowork-owned Node plus lockfile build when the private artifact package has a supported input artifact.
Initial bootstrap copies the pinned portable Python environment. This can later be assembled from Python plus a hashed requirements lock.
Platform-native Git, Poppler, libheif, and jxrlib payloads are copied until each has a Cowork-owned fetch/build recipe.
The official checksum-pinned LibreOffice payload is normalized per platform. Interactive Windows launchers are removed and its program directory is never added to PATH.
Cowork owns the only public soffice entrypoint. It rejects UI and printing options, forces headless flags, disables printer detection, and uses a disposable profile.
Cowork generates relocatable launchers for pnpm and native utilities for each platform.
Cowork-owned resolver source is packaged into the runtime so ESM builders can import managed dependencies from scratch directories.
The source runtime manifest is retained as provenance; runtime.json is Cowork-owned.
